events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May was born on this day in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May! From stadium-rocking anthems to his iconic Red Special, the Queen legend continues to inspire.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being the first music video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, changing music forever. The first video? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Poetic, isn't it?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century of Britpop brilliance! Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' dropped on this day in 1994, launching them into superstardom. What’s your album highlight?

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, began on this day in 1969, featuring iconic performances over three days.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud, music, and magic of Woodstock began! Three days that defined a generation. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, on the anniversary of his passing. His music truly lives forever.

events.title: Tupac Shakur shot in Las Vegas
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas, tragically dying six days later.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 20 years ago today, the music world was shaken by the shooting of Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas. His legacy as one of hip-hop's greats endures.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the revolutionary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on this day in 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The one, the only, 'Abbey Road'! The Beatles' legendary album was released on this day in 1969, giving us that unforgettable cover. What's your top track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman and rock icon Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' legend still rocks harder than most. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, and solo artist Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: You know the voice, you know the attitude! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What’s your favourite track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on this day in the UK in 1975, four years after its album debut.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine' all the people... living life in peace. John Lennon's timeless anthem was released as a UK single on this day in 1975. Still resonates today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple dropped the first one, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music consumption forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on this day in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. What's your favourite Bond film or theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, born in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incomparable John Lennon. A true icon whose music and message continue to resonate.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today, born in 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Sending a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'White Album'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: The White Album Turns
angles.copy: 58 years ago today, The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A sprawling, eclectic masterpiece. What's your hidden gem track from this double LP?
